title: Cobblemom for Handsome People
description: Only the handsomest of all people can play this pack(Please reference to picture). For use in a highly customized server.
body: Cobblemon related modpack that is meant to give you a fully fleshed experience. The modpack inculudes several datapack to cover the missing models and introduce elements to obtain legendary pokemon. Also contains a bunch of QOL and performance related mods in order to round the experience for the player. Main function is for use in a customized server.
